privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to generate a synthetic schematic from a blank drawing without any prerequisite files. The expected output file paths, /home/ga/Diagrams/led_driver_schematic.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/led_driver_schematic.png, explicitly match the task description and export_result.sh checks. The required labels and expected component shapes directly match the schematic components listed in the prompt instructions.
